title: OpenStack nova
description: Configuration for the Nova compute service (OpenStack-Helm nova, release 2025.1). Only the fields here are settable on a Composition; everything else uses the chart defaults in values.yaml. Deploy all the OpenStack component blueprints into one namespace to form a complete install. (Nova/libvirt virt_type=qemu is a fixed default in values.yaml to avoid the crdgen Kind-vs-'nova' property collision.)
